properties.title: FinPilot Request Volume, Error Rate, and Latency
properties.query: SOURCE '${FINPILOT_LOG_GROUP}' | fields @timestamp, event, path, status_code, latency_ms | filter event = 'finpilot_http_request' | stats count(*) as request_volume, avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms, pct(latency_ms, 50) as p50_latency_ms, pct(latency_ms, 95) as p95_latency_ms, 100 * sum(if(status_code >= 400, 1, 0)) / count(*) as error_rate by bin(5m) | sort @timestamp desc

properties.title: FinPilot LLM Tokens, Latency, and Estimated Cost
properties.query: SOURCE '${FINPILOT_LOG_GROUP}' | fields @timestamp, event, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, latency_ms, estimated_cost_usd | filter event = 'finpilot_llm_call' | stats sum(total_tokens) as tokens, avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms, sum(estimated_cost_usd) as estimated_cost_usd by model, bin(5m) | sort @timestamp desc

properties.title: Research Recommendations
properties.query: SOURCE '${FINPILOT_LOG_GROUP}' | fields @timestamp, event, ticker, recommendation, confidence_score, suggested_allocation | filter event = 'finpilot_research_completed' | sort @timestamp desc | limit 50

properties.title: Errors
properties.query: SOURCE '${FINPILOT_LOG_GROUP}' | fields @timestamp, event, path, query, error | filter ispresent(error) and error != '' | sort @timestamp desc | limit 50
